name: Nandini
bio: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer with strong problem-solving skills, pursuing B.Tech in Computer Science (AIML) at ABES Engineering College. I build elegant, high-performance web applications using modern tech stacks.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology, Computer Science - AIML (8.0 CGPA)

experience.description: Enhanced the official E-Cell website by implementing new features and optimising site performance, resulting in a 75% improvement in page load times and increased user engagement, while ensuring intuitive navigation and an updated, modern interface.
highlights: Optimized site performance and updated modern UI

projects.name: Mentor Map
projects.description: Built responsive and accessible UI components using React and TailwindCSS, converting Figma designs into pixel-perfect web interfaces. Implemented dynamic forms, dashboards, and user flows for mentor discovery and profile management with TypeScript-based state handling. Integrated frontend with REST APIs to display real-time mentor recommendations and user data.
projects.impact: Helps students find mentors with real-time recommendations

projects.name: TES-4.0
projects.description: Developed and deployed TES v4, a responsive web application using modern frontend technologies and hosted on Vercel. Implemented clean UI design and optimized user experience with efficient component structure and responsive layout.
projects.impact: Clean UI and optimized user experience

achievements: Winner — Smart India Hackathon 2024: National-level hackathon (385+ entries) organized by the Ministry of Education, Govt. of India.
Runner-up — Internal Hackathon, ABES Engineering College: 2nd out of 100+ teams in a HACK-O-VERSE ABESEC hackathon.
Top-20 — Internal Hackathon, ABES Engineering College: Among top 20 teams out of 450+ teams in a HCL-GUVI hackathon.
certifications: Certified Cloud Computing Practitioner (Udemy): Developed practical expertise in cloud infrastructure, virtualization, and scalability principles.
personalityTraits: Detail-oriented and passionate about clean, scalable code
Strong problem-solver with a competitive DSA mindset
Loves building things that look great AND work great
Team player — proven by hackathon wins
